name: TestMesh
description: TestMesh is an AI-powered integration testing platform that analyzes your services, generates end-to-end test flows in YAML, and executes them across HTTP, Kafka, gRPC, WebSocket, and database protocols.

skills.name: Service Analysis
skills.description: Analyze a service's endpoints, schemas, and inter-service dependencies to build a complete testing model

skills.name: Test Flow Generation
skills.description: Generate layered YAML test flows covering happy paths, edge cases, and cross-service scenarios

skills.name: Test Execution
skills.description: Execute test flows against live services and return structured pass/fail results with diffs

skills.name: Coverage Gap Detection
skills.description: Identify untested endpoints and suggest flows to fill coverage gaps

skills.name: Failure Diagnosis
skills.description: Analyze failed executions and explain root causes with suggested fixes
